title: Lemon Coconut Thai Chicken Curry
description: A rich, juicy Thai curry that balances bright lemon flavor with creamy coconut, perfect for kids and low‑sodium friendly.

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: adds sweetness, can reduce if needed

instructions: In a bowl whisk together low‑sodium soy sauce, low‑sodium fish sauce, honey, lemon juice, and red curry paste until smooth; set aside.
Heat a tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat. Add minced garlic and ginger, cooking until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Add chicken pieces and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate.
Pour coconut milk into the skillet, scraping up browned bits. Bring to a gentle simmer.
Return chicken to the skillet along with the prepared sauce mixture. Stir to combine.
Add sliced carrots and broccoli florets. Cover and cook on low heat until vegetables are tender and chicken reaches 75 °C (165 °F), about 10‑12 minutes.
Stir in lemon zest, lemon juice, and a splash of water if the sauce is too thick. Let simmer for 2 minutes, adjusting seasoning with a pinch of salt if needed.
Serve curry over steamed jasmine rice or cauliflower rice, garnishing with fresh cilantro or green onions. Enjoy!
